goal: Create an internal workflow where managers approve expense claims with receipts, reasons, export, roles, and audit log.
doneWhen: Employee submission includes receipt and reason.
Manager queue supports approve/reject with reason.
Finance export and audit log are represented.
doNotBuild: Do not add fake productivity metrics.
Do not add payments or payroll automation.
allowedAssumptions: Use placeholder rows instead of real employee data.
Keep permissions simple for first build.
continueIf: Core workflow is present but visual polish is incomplete.
stopWhen: The builder removes role-specific behavior or audit logging.
askHumanIf: Approval thresholds or finance export format need policy decisions.
smallestRepair: Repair the missing workflow slice only: submission, queue, decision, export, role state, or audit log.
